paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.58, representing a decrease of 1.05% from the prior close and 24.28% over the last 21 sessions. The price is as of July 22, 2026.

There have been no new news headlines in the last 24 hours, but recent news includes a report from The Globe and Mail on July 14, 2026, stating that a Fermi Inc. director resigned amid a governance dispute. Additionally, social posts mention the arrival of Siemens turbines at the Port of Houston and a separate announcement from Google regarding its FY26 CapEx guide.

Fermi Inc. has filed several recent SEC filings, including an 8-K/A on July 21, 2026, disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson and a response letter from Everson. Other filings include an 8-K on July 15, 2026, regarding the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031, and a SCHEDULE 13G filing on July 20, 2026. There has been one Form 4 filing, but no Form 144 filings.
